# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.

Write secure code.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

name: Deploy Application

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build artifacts
        run: npm run build

      - name: Deploy to production
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.1.5
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          key: ${{ secrets.SSH_KEY }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/app
            git pull origin main
            npm install --production
            pm2 restart app || pm2 start app.js -n app
          port: ${{ secrets.PORT }}
